machine_name: EM Interference Awareness Device — Type 1 (Fixed Station)
assembly_instructions: Fixed ground installation of Japan's satellite EM-interference awareness system. A large steerable parabolic dish on a concrete pedestal performs primary satellite monitoring; a secondary panel array and mast-mounted wideband antennas perform survey and geolocation; an EMI-shielded operations shelter houses the signal-processing racks and operator consoles; a backup generator shed supplies conditioned power.

info.japanese_name: 電磁妨害状況把握装置1型
info.english_name: Electromagnetic Interference Situation Awareness Device, Type 1
info.summary: Stationary ground station built by Mitsubishi Heavy Industries to monitor electromagnetic interference against Japanese satellites and to train JASDF units in countering communications-satellite jamming.
info.description: Type 1 is the fixed installation in the 電磁妨害状況把握装置 family — Japan's procurement of equipment to build situational awareness of electromagnetic interference targeting its artificial satellites. The system's mission is twofold: continuously observe the RF environment around Japanese spacecraft so that jamming or interference can be detected and characterised, and provide a training and evaluation capability for the Air Self-Defense Force against communications-satellite jamming. The prime contract went to Mitsubishi Heavy Industries in FY2021 (¥5.357B), and a follow-on function-enhancement contract was signed with MHI in FY2024. A companion mobile variant (Type 2) was contracted with NEC the following fiscal year.

facts.label: Role
facts.value: Detect, characterise, and train against EM interference to Japanese satellites

facts.label: Procuring body
facts.value: Acquisition, Technology & Logistics Agency (防衛装備庁)

sources.title: JM2040 — 防衛装備庁、電磁妨害状況把握装置を契約

parts.name: Concrete Apron
parts.role: Reinforced concrete pad supporting the station's structures and dish foundations.

parts.name: Dish Foundation
parts.role: Cylindrical reinforced-concrete foundation isolating the dish from ground vibration.

parts.name: Az/El Pedestal
parts.role: Two-axis positioner carrying the main dish, with azimuth and elevation drives.

parts.name: Primary Parabolic Dish
parts.role: 7.2 m steerable parabolic reflector; primary sensor for downlink monitoring of Japanese communications satellites.

parts.name: Dish Feed Horn
parts.role: Cassegrain feed assembly at the focal point of the primary reflector.

parts.name: Phased-Array Panel
parts.role: Stationary phased-array antenna for wide-sector interference survey.

parts.name: Array Support Frame
parts.role: Tilt frame supporting the phased-array panel.

parts.name: Antenna Mast
parts.role: Free-standing mast carrying wideband survey and reference antennas.

parts.name: Wideband Discone
parts.role: Omnidirectional wideband survey antenna, 25 MHz – 3 GHz.

parts.name: Log-Periodic Array
parts.role: Directional array for bearing estimation across L/S band.

parts.name: GNSS Reference Antenna
parts.role: Time/position reference for coherent capture across receivers.

parts.name: Operations Shelter
parts.role: EMI-shielded building housing racks, operator consoles, and crew workspace.

parts.name: Shelter Door
parts.role: Personnel access door.

parts.name: RF Receiver Rack
parts.role: Low-noise amplifiers, downconverters, and SDR receiver chain.

parts.name: Signal Processing Rack
parts.role: Correlator and spectral-analysis compute for interference classification and geolocation.

parts.name: Operator Consoles
parts.role: Analyst workstations for monitoring, tasking, and reporting.

parts.name: Console Display Wall
parts.role: Waterfall / spectrum / geolocation displays.

parts.name: Generator Shed
parts.role: Enclosure for the diesel backup generator and fuel tank.

parts.name: Backup Generator
parts.role: Diesel genset providing site power during grid outage.

parts.name: Power Conditioning Unit
parts.role: UPS and isolation transformer feeding clean mains to the receiver chain.

parts.name: Perimeter Fence N
parts.role: Security perimeter fence, north side.

parts.name: Perimeter Fence S
parts.role: Security perimeter fence, south side.

parts.name: Perimeter Fence E
parts.role: Security perimeter fence, east side.

parts.name: Perimeter Fence W
parts.role: Security perimeter fence, west side.
